name: USS PC-1080 (PC-1080)
events: 22 Dec 1943 Around 0700 VW/22, USS Searaven (T/Lt.Cdr. M.H. Dry, USN) made rendezvous with USS PC-1080 (Lt. A.G. Steer, Jr., USNR) which then escorted her to Pearl Harbor.
USS Searaven moored at the Submarine Base at 1130 VW/22 ending her 9th war patrol.
USS Searaven refitted from 23 December 1943 to 5 January 1944 during which period she was also docked.
Post refit trials and exercises were carried out from 6 to 12 January 1944. (1)

26 Jul 1944 USS Apogon (Cdr. W.P. Schoeni, USN) ended her 4th war patrol at Pearl Harbor. She was escorted in by USS PC 1080. She then underwent battle damage repairs at the Pearl Harbor Navy Yard as of July 30th.
